name: pip-skills
description: Claude Code skills for serious engineering work. Architectural doctrine enforcement and PR review, built for real workflows and shared because they might help yours.

plugins.name: puritan
plugins.description: Architectural doctrine enforcement through composable lenses. Covenant for planning, Inquisition for auditing, Scriptorium for writing new doctrine.

plugins.name: tribunal
plugins.description: PR comment review, categorisation, prioritisation and resolution. No heresy goes unaddressed.
